positive: A whimsical and serene forest creature, stylized like a glowing bioluminescent fox, sitting peacefully on a cluster of stylized oversized mushrooms. The fox has deep turquoise fur with glowing neon yellow accents, and its tail leaves subtle trails of ethereal light. Surrounding elements include stylized ferns and crystal dew drops, rendered with clean, graphic lines and heavy outlines. Use a vibrant, saturated color palette dominated by deep sapphire blue, neon yellow, and forest emerald green. The composition should be highly symmetrical, centered, and isolated against a deep, gradient navy background, optimized for print transfer. Clean silhouette, flat graphic quality, vector art style, high contrast, magical realism illustration, designed for apparel screen printing.
